title: LuminaireType
description: LuminaireType: A LuminaireType containing manufacturer, dimensional, and other property data applied to a Luminaire.

Manufacturer.description: Name of the Manufacturer of this LuminaireType

LuminaireGeometry.description: Boundary Representation of the LuminaireType's Geometry BoundaryRepresentation: Solid representation defined by a collection of connected surfaces forming a closed volume

NumberOfLamps.description: Number of lamps included in this LuminaireType

MountingType.description: Mounting type eg Wall-Mounted, Ceiling Recessed, etc)

Model.description: Model name of the LuminaireType as per the Manufacturer

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
